eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11, failing the migration goal to use Java 17 features and bytecode.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use the 'release' flag for cross-compilation support.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: While not strictly required if source/target are set elsewhere, using 'release' is the modern standard for Java 9+ to ensure correct module path and bytecode version alignment.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.5 to 2.7.6.
Update JUnit Jupiter version from 5.9.1 to 5.9.2.
Update H2 database driver version from 2.1.212 to 2.1.214.
Add thymeleaf-layout-dialect dependency for template layout support.
Replace spring-boot-test with spring-boot-starter-test for comprehensive testing support.
Explicitly define resources directory in build configuration.
Update Kotlin source directory path to use project.basedir variable.

eDrops/src/main/java/com/sigmondsmart/ed.general_idea: Add SLF4J logger import to support logging functionality.
Add SLF4J LoggerFactory import to support logger instantiation.
Add GetMapping import to use specific HTTP method mapping.
Instantiate a static SLF4J logger field for the controller class.
Replace generic RequestMapping with specific GetMapping annotation.
Add log statement to record welcome event.
Add additional model attribute for Java-specific message.

eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Rename the logging instance variable from 'log' to 'logger' to align with common naming conventions.
Rename the logging variable from 'log' to 'logger' to align with standard naming conventions.
Changed 'changed' property from immutable val to mutable var to allow modification after construction.
Replaced 'text' property with multiple new properties (tag, version, title, summary, blog) to expand domain model.
Added a custom toString() method to the data class for better debugging/logging output.
eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.after: override fun toString() = "id: $id blog: $blog created: $created changed: $changed text: $title"

eDrops/src/main/kotlin/com/sigmondsmart/.general_idea: Inject DbService dependency into KotlinTestController to enable database operations.
Add import for the newly injected DbService class.
Add endpoint to create a blog entry using the injected service.
Add endpoint to read a blog entry using the injected service.

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Added server error configuration to include stacktrace and exception details.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.after:
server:
  error:
    include-stacktrace: always
    include-exception: true

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Disabled the Spring Boot startup banner.
Configured internationalization (i18n) message sources with fallback and encoding.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.after:
spring:
  messages:
    basename: language/messages
    fallback-to-system-locale: true
    encoding: UTF-8

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Specified the Hibernate dialect for H2 database.
Enabled deferred datasource initialization to allow schema/data scripts to run after schema creation.
Configured Hibernate to hide SQL logging.
Changed the in-memory H2 database name from mydb1 to mydb2.
Explicitly set the JDBC driver class name for H2.
Enabled the H2 web console for development access.
Configured Thymeleaf template engine settings including cache disabling and HTML5 mode.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.after:
thymeleaf:
    cache: false
    enabled: true
    encoding: UTF-8
    mode: HTML5

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Configured static resource locations to point to the source directory and disabled caching.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.after:
web:
    resources:
      static-locations: file:src/main/resources/static/
      cache:
        period: 0

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Enabled Spring Boot DevTools live reload.

eDrops/src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Add Hibernate logger configurations to control SQL and binding log levels.

eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/welc.general_idea: Adopt Thymeleaf Layout Dialect to enable template inheritance and modularize the page structure.
Wrap page content in a layout fragment to be injected into the parent template.
Remove hardcoded Bootstrap 3.3.7 WebJars references in favor of styles managed by the parent layout or global CSS.
Remove hardcoded Bootstrap 3.3.7 JavaScript WebJar reference as it is likely handled by the layout or no longer needed.
Remove hardcoded navigation bar HTML since navigation is likely moved to the shared layout template.
eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/welc.before:
Spring Boot
  • Home
  • About

eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/welc.general_idea: Update page title and content structure to match new design requirements.
